title: Kaleidoscopic
description: Kaleidoscopic is a building mod centered around color and Minecraft's dyes. Every color has it's own separate, unique texture and identity.
body:
![Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3da9f2241f3e8ebb72fcda03e7c90180445af665.png)

Kaleidoscopic is a building mod centered around color and Minecraft's dyes. Every color has it's own separate, unique texture and identity.

## Features

All features in this mod are toggleable via a config!

- Dyed Wooden Doors
- Dyed Wooden Trapdoors
- Dyed Ladders
- Dyed Rocks - Dyed Rocks are made by mixing dyes with any rock like cobblestone!
- Dyed Chiseled Rocks
- Dyed Rock Bricks
- Dyed Rock Variants
- Dyed Lamps

## Integration
These mods have integration features built-in to the mod so they play together smoothly.

- [Arts & Crafts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artsandcrafts)
- [Carpentry & Chisels](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpentry-and-chisels)
- [Delicate Dyes](https://modrinth.com/mod/delicate-dyes)
